---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this feature solve? What use case does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you'd like. Include example CLI usage if relevant:
```bash
dconv to-pdf *.docx --your-new-flag
```

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you considered and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, links, references, or anything else that helps explain the request.
